title: The middle is splitting in two
subtitle: US tech employment change, 2024–2025, by age cohort.
caption: Source: Stack Overflow / labor-market analysis of AI-exposed occupations, 2025.

left.label: Senior cohort (35–49)
left.description: employment up, powered by demand for engineers who can orchestrate AI and own judgment calls.

right.label: Entry cohort (22–25)
right.description: employment down. Entry-level tech postings are off 34% vs 2020 — the rung that trains juniors is vanishing.
